title: ONLY SON
description: Exploring romantic love and personal connection.
lyrics: It's amazing, you're amazing, you know you're amazing, spell it right, M-E-A-S-O-N, every night I see your baby blue, oh my baby blue, my own summer, my life, hey, what you just saying, who you are, looking amazing with your eyes in the air, tears like a century in the past, understand the world, understand it all, I'm sorry you think this is wrong, wrong, you're the one, baby, you're the one I think I know, when I see your eyes you make me go, you're my sun, you're my only light, when you look at me I'm all right, yeah, all night, ooh, the places that we'll go, places that we'll see, you and me, maybe mama if she wants to, but I'll take you further than you know, teach you the wind, the rain, the stars and the snow, don't worry I didn't want, a pillboard ways to school, I said it's your choice, everything you've got is underneath your hands, love behind you, you can understand, it's not how you fall, it's not how you go, it's knowing you, all inside and, be what makes you complete and for others, shine, baby shine, my only light of mine, my only sun, baby shine, shine, ooh, sneeze, god bless you baby, you're just what I need, I know the day gets long and, I know one day you won't like this song, but listen to know, you are part of me and part of stars, a part of all the way, but then there's destiny and fate won't end the missing sides, you're so beautiful child, with my eyes I can't hide, especially when you look that way, oh, baby blue, my only light I'll ever know, you'll ever know, that's where you rest and that's how it goes, baby blue, oh no, why are you crying, you my baby blue, oh no, oh my god what happened, what happened, oh my god what happened, oh no, oh no, what's that little baby doing, what's that little baby doing, what's that little baby doing, oh my god, oh my god, oh my god, oh my god, oh my god, oh my god, oh my god, oh my god
